name: manage_alerts
description: Create and manage weather alerts that trigger notifications when specific weather conditions are met at a location. You can set thresholds on any weather field (e.g. temperature above 35C, wind speed above 50 km/h, precipitation probability above 80%). Supports creating, listing, updating, activating/deactivating, and deleting alerts.

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Your API key for authentication (passed as query parameter).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A descriptive name for the alert.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Location object with latitude and longitude.

parameters.name: conditions
parameters.description: Array of condition objects specifying the weather field, operator, and threshold value.

parameters.name: webhook_url
parameters.description: URL to receive webhook notifications when the alert triggers.
